news.title: Equinix Revenue Upgrade Highlights AI Data Center Push In India And Indonesia
news.summary: Equinix (NasdaqGS:EQIX) has raised its annual revenue outlook, citing stronger demand for data centers supporting artificial intelligence workloads. The company is expanding into India and Indonesia with new facilities in Chennai and Jakarta, aiming to broaden its global footprint. For investors watching digital infrastructure, Equinix sits at the center of growing demand for data center capacity tied to AI adoption. The stock trades at $856.74, with a 7.0% return over the past 30 days and...

news.title: The Bull Case For Equinix (EQIX) Could Change Following Its 2026 Earnings Setup Amid AI Data Center Focus
news.summary: In recent days, Equinix has drawn attention as investors focus on its upcoming February 11, 2026 earnings release and evolving analyst views amid broader REIT market developments. An interesting angle is how Equinix sits at the center of enduring enthusiasm for data center REITs, as AI-driven computing demand keeps this niche in focus even while other AI-linked trades see reduced interest. We’ll now examine how Equinix’s role in the AI-fueled data center REIT theme shapes its investment...

news.title: Equinix to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
news.summary: EQIX's Q4 earnings are likely to have benefited from growing demand for data centers amid increasing digitization, though high interest expenses may have hurt.

news.title: Equinix Inc (NASDAQ:EQIX) Reports Strong Q4 2025 Earnings Beat and Raises Dividend
